raw_consumer_statement:
I have an Macys Credit card. I lost my card and notified Macys of this immediately. The same day I lost the card there was a transaction made with my Macys card that I did not authorize in the amount of {$460.00}. I disputed this charge from XXXX with Macys and received credit for the transaction the same month. 

In XXXX I was then charged again for {$460.00} due to Macys stating they did not find the charge to be fraudulent. This transaction is fraudulent and was not authorized by me. I asked Macys to provide me with proof to show this transaction is not fraudulent based on their investigation and Macys didn't provide anything. I need full reimbursement for this transaction credited to my account. Billing statements will be provided as supporting documentation.
